description_long: This is a bronze bust of a man mounted on a tall, rectangular stone pedestal. The bust features detailed facial features and a formal attire, suggesting a commemorative or historical figure. The pedestal is inscribed with text, likely providing information about the subject, and stands on a square base set into the ground, surrounded by soil and some scattered leaves. The sculpture is accompanied by a small cylindrical object nearby, possibly a marker or part of the installation. The surface of the bust has a dark, weathered patina, while the pedestal shows signs of exposure to the elements. The overall presentation is solemn and dignified, suitable for a memorial or public park setting.
description: A bronze bust of a man on a tall stone pedestal with an inscribed plaque, set on a square base in an outdoor environment.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the pedestal, with the square base and surrounding ground visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the bust, the thickness of the pedestal, and a small cylindrical object on the ground nearby.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the face of the bust, the inscribed text on the pedestal, and the square base with some ground details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the bust and the pedestal, with the base and ground context visible.
attribute_location_context: Outdoor setting with soil and scattered leaves, likely in a park or public memorial area.
